name: Security-Guidance Plugin Integration
goal: Integrate Anthropic's security-guidance plugin for all IronClaude workers with Stage 2 disabled via ENABLE_STOP_REVIEW=0

tasks.name: Add ENABLE_STOP_REVIEW=0 to worker spawn env vars
tasks.description: Add export ENABLE_STOP_REVIEW=0 to both worker spawn sites (orchestrator_mcp.py and main.py) alongside existing IC_ROLE/IC_WORKER_ID env vars. Update tests to assert the new env var is present in spawn commands.

steps.description: Update test assertions in test_orchestrator_mcp.py to expect ENABLE_STOP_REVIEW=0 in spawn commands (3 locations: line 82, 630, 644)
steps.expected: Test file updated with new assertions

steps.description: Run tests to verify they fail (RED)
steps.command: cd commander && python -m pytest tests/test_orchestrator_mcp.py::TestSpawnWorkerEnvVar -v && python -m pytest tests/test_orchestrator_mcp.py -k test_spawn_worker_registers -v
steps.expected: FAIL — command strings don't contain ENABLE_STOP_REVIEW=0 yet

steps.description: Add export ENABLE_STOP_REVIEW=0 to orchestrator_mcp.py:1596 spawn site
steps.expected: Spawn command includes ENABLE_STOP_REVIEW=0 for all worker types

steps.description: Add export ENABLE_STOP_REVIEW=0 to main.py:1115 spawn site (also add export IC_ROLE=worker to align with orchestrator pattern)
steps.expected: Both spawn sites now include ENABLE_STOP_REVIEW=0

steps.description: Run tests to verify they pass (GREEN)
steps.command: cd commander && python -m pytest tests/test_orchestrator_mcp.py::TestSpawnWorkerEnvVar -v && python -m pytest tests/test_orchestrator_mcp.py -k test_spawn_worker_registers -v

tasks.name: Add plugin presence check to session-init.sh
tasks.description: Add non-blocking check in session-init.sh that verifies security-guidance plugin is installed in ~/.claude/plugins/cache/. Logs warning if missing. No test framework for shell hooks.

steps.description: Add security-guidance plugin check block after stable hook directory block (~line 154), before statusline path block
steps.expected: session-init.sh logs warning when plugin not found in cache

tasks.name: Update README with security-guidance install instructions
tasks.description: Add security-guidance plugin install step to README Quick Start section after existing ironclaude plugin install. Documentation only.

steps.description: Add security-guidance install step after /reload-plugins in Quick Start section
